# zaps.work

> zaps.work is a free, multilingual collection of practical cost calculators and quote tools for fabrication, local services, and independent work.

## About

zaps.work helps people turn job inputs into a cost breakdown, margin check, and customer-ready quote. The first live tool is a 3D printing cost calculator for FDM work.

Calculations and PDF or CSV generation run in the user's browser. Customer names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, company details, quote numbers, item names, notes, and other customer-related fields are not sent to or stored in the product analytics database.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://zaps.work/): Overview of the cost calculator and quote tool library.
- [Tool library](https://zaps.work/tools): Available and planned calculators.
- [3D Print Cost Calculator](https://zaps.work/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Calculate filament, machine time, electricity, labor, failure risk, margin, shipping, tax, and quote totals. Export PDF or CSV.
- [Privacy](https://zaps.work/privacy): Data boundary and analytics practices.

## Localized pages

- [繁體中文首頁](https://zaps.work/zh-hant): Traditional Chinese site navigation.
- [繁體中文 3D 列印成本計算器](https://zaps.work/zh-hant/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Traditional Chinese calculator page.
- [Deutsch Startseite](https://zaps.work/de): German site navigation.
- [Deutscher 3D-Druckkostenrechner](https://zaps.work/de/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): German calculator page.
- [日本語 3Dプリントコスト計算機](https://zaps.work/ja/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Japanese calculator page.
- [Calculadora de costes de impresión 3D](https://zaps.work/es/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Spanish calculator page.
- [Calculateur de coût d’impression 3D](https://zaps.work/fr/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): French calculator page.
- [Calculadora de custos de impressão 3D](https://zaps.work/pt-br/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Brazilian Portuguese calculator page.
- [3D 프린팅 비용 계산기](https://zaps.work/ko/tools/3d-print-cost-calculator): Korean calculator page.

## Tool capabilities

- Multiple print items with editable quantity and material inputs.
- Material, machine, electricity, labor, packaging, waste, failure-risk, shipping, tax, margin, and minimum-fee calculations.
- Global currency selection with search and scrolling, including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY, TWD, and other major currencies.
- Local browser exports for customer-ready PDF and CSV documents.
- Privacy-safe aggregate export events for product analysis; customer-related free text is excluded.

## Source and feedback

- [Open-source repository](https://github.com/wudanglaodao/zaps-work-quote): Source code, calculation logic, privacy boundary, and release workflow.
- [Feedback and issues](https://github.com/wudanglaodao/zaps-work-quote/issues): Report bugs or suggest tools.
- [Contact](mailto:info@lopuo.com): Contact zaps.work.

## Canonical guidance

Use the page language that matches the reader. English pages use unprefixed URLs; Traditional Chinese and German pages use their locale prefixes. Use the linked page content as the source of truth for current features and supported inputs.
